sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import './PortfolioPage.css'; import { portfolioData } from '../data/portfolioData'; const skillGroups = [ { title: 'Programming Languages', key: 'languages' }, { title: 'Frontend', key: 'frontend' }, { title: 'Backend', key: 'backend' }, { title: 'Databases', key: 'databases' }, { title: 'Tools & Platforms', key: 'tools' }, { title: 'Core CS', key: 'fundamentals' }, ]; const heroStats = [ { value: '1000+', label: 'DSA Problems Solved' }, { value: '3+', label: 'Advanced Full-Stack Projects' }, { value: '7+', label: 'AWS Certifications' }, ]; const PortfolioPage = ({ theme }) => { return (

$ open_to_work --roles "SDE, Full-Stack Engineer"

Open to SDE & Full-Stack Roles

{portfolioData.name} {portfolioData.role}

{portfolioData.tagline}

{portfolioData.summary}

Location: India Focus: AI x Full-Stack Availability: Immediate
LinkedIn GitHub Projects
{heroStats.map((item) => (

{item.value}

{item.label}

))}

01 Skills Summary

{skillGroups.map((group) => (

{group.title}

{portfolioData.skills[group.key].map((item) => ( {item} ))}
))}

02 Featured Projects

{portfolioData.projects.map((project) => (

{project.title}

Live Link

Case Study

{project.stack.join(' • ')}

    {project.points.map((point) => (
  • {point}
    • ))}
))}

03 Education

{portfolioData.education.map((item) => (

{item.degree}

{item.specialization}

{item.institute}

{item.location}

{item.duration}

))}

04 Achievements

    {portfolioData.achievements.map((item) => (
  • {item}
    • ))}

05 Let's Connect

Reach out for internships, full-time roles, collaborations, and product discussions.

  • Email
  • LinkedIn
  • GitHub
  • LeetCode
  • CodeChef
  • Personal Portfolio
); }; export default PortfolioPage;
